description: Data science stack with ML and visualization dependencies
review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on PyPI
Check for known CVEs in pinned versions
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: Typosquat: 'scikitlearn' is a misspelling of the popular 'scikit-learn' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
Package 'pandas-utils' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
pillow 9.3.0 has CVE-2023-44271: denial of service vulnerability via crafted image that causes uncontrolled resource consumption.
Typosquat: 'tensorflw' is a misspelling of the popular 'tensorflow' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
